cli_verbs.name: thread read
cli_verbs.summary: Read a mail thread by id.

function_wrappers.name: mailai_list_inbox
function_wrappers.summary: List recent inbox messages for the current user.

function_wrappers.name: mailai_read_thread
function_wrappers.summary: Read a single thread by id.

function_wrappers.name: mailai_respond_invite
function_wrappers.summary: RSVP to a calendar invite from a thread (calendar:respond-from-ics).

function_wrappers.name: mailai_set_importance
function_wrappers.summary: Mark a message important / not important (mail:set-importance).

function_wrappers.name: mailai_schedule_send
function_wrappers.summary: Schedule a draft to send later (mail:schedule-send).
